visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a blurred background of a warehouse-style supermarket interior. Large, vibrant text overlays dominate the screen, including the Costco logo and promotional text about a weekly sale. Floating yellow lantern icons drift across the frame. (2) A rapid series of shots follows, each showcasing a different food product on store shelves. The camera is mostly static or has very slight handheld movement. Products include plastic-wrapped trays of raw sliced beef, green boxes of crackers, stacks of red milk tea cartons, and yellow boxes of ramen. Each shot is accompanied by a large text overlay detailing the product name, original price, discount, and sale price. (3) The sequence continues through various aisles. Snacks like seaweed, chocolate biscuits, and large bags of nuts are shown. The environment is consistently bright with industrial indoor lighting. In the background of some shots, blurred figures of shoppers pushing carts are visible. (4) The focus shifts to household items and beverages. Boxes of men's underwear, stacks of sparkling water bottles, and rows of bottled tea and juices are presented. The camera angles are mostly eye-level or slightly high, looking down at the products. (5) The final segments display fresh fish fillets in trays, large packs of instant noodles, and personal care items like mouthwash and toothpaste. The video concludes with several alcoholic beverages, including cases of red wine and Corona beer, maintaining the same high-speed editing and informational overlay style.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Multiple blurred shoppers and staff are visible in the background aisles throughout the video.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of typical large-scale warehouse store aisles with high metal shelving, industrial concrete floors, and bright overhead fluorescent lighting. Various consumer products are stacked in bulk.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy, fast-paced electronic pop music featuring a strong 4/4 beat. A male narrator immediately speaks in an enthusiastic, rapid-fire tone, introducing the weekly Costco special report and urging listeners to follow. (2) As the visuals cut rapidly from one product to another, the narrator maintains a near-constant stream of speech, calling out each product name and price with professional clarity. The vocal pitch is moderately high and expressive. (3) Subtle digital 'whoosh' or 'pop' sound effects occur occasionally, synchronized with the rapid visual transitions between different food aisles. The music remains upbeat and continuous in the background. (4) Throughout the middle of the track, there is a consistent overlap of vocals and music. The narrator's speech rate is exceptionally high, matching the visual montage of snacks and drinks. There are no pauses in the narration or the BGM. (5) Toward the end, the narrator continues listing hygiene products and alcoholic beverages at the same brisk pace. The audio maintains high clarity and studio-quality production values until the final second, where both the narration and the music conclude abruptly with the last product display.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a rapid, comprehensive overview of current discounted items at Costco stores in Taiwan, encouraging viewers to shop and follow the creator's channel for weekly updates.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video presents a neutral list of store discounts, functioning more as a deal-finding guide than a paid brand endorsement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: This is a typical high-information-density social media video designed for quick consumption. The combination of extremely fast visual cuts and synchronized rapid-fire narration creates a sense of urgency and excitement about the deals.
